subject: v2-S01: Stage A locked-prior warm-start
description: Build LockedPriorWarmStart consuming surface_registration_v2, roi_area_sxy, surfaces_iter08; emit (R, sxy, t_x, t_y, t_z) for all 6 subjects; replace default_warmstart_zyx in P1/P4/P6/C5 dispatch and re-bench on F9. Validate locked-prior matches or beats v1 default warm-start on ≥4/6 subjects.
